rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §38.2545, which governs school district telemedicine mental health services. No overlap in subject matter, funding mechanism, or operative provisions.
quote: Sec. 38.2545. TEXAS CHILD HEALTH ACCESS THROUGH TELEMEDICINE.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school telemedicine services and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
